intentSynonyms: make a new site in netlify
open a new site in netlify
create a new site in netlify
description: Create a new Netlify site in the specified account. Provide a site name (used as the subdomain). Returns the created site details.

account_slug.description: The account slug to create the site in

name.description: Site name (becomes the subdomain, e.g. "my-app" → my-app.netlify.app)
